entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Hi Priya, welcome to the Trend Micro booth. I'm Casey. Let me show you Vision One — our unified security platform.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Thanks. We're a mid-size financial firm, about 3,500 endpoints. Our biggest headache right now is BYOD — our employees use personal iPhones and Android devices to access corporate email.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: That's exactly one of Vision One's strongest areas. Let me start with Endpoint Security and show you how we handle BYOD specifically.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Great. We looked at CrowdStrike Falcon Go for this but found the mobile coverage was limited.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: So here we are in Endpoint Security. This BYOD Policy panel lets you define enrollment requirements without requiring full MDM. The employee enrolls their device, and we apply a containerized workspace — corporate data stays isolated.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Does this require installing a full MDM agent? Our employees pushed back hard when we tried MobileIron.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: No full MDM needed. It's a lightweight container app. The company never sees personal photos, texts, or apps. Here's the Device Enrollment Settings — you can see the options: require PIN, require OS version, but nothing that touches personal data.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: That's a key differentiator for us. Can we set different policies for iOS versus Android?

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Yes, platform-specific policies are fully supported. You can see the iOS and Android tabs here. Let me jump over to XDR now to show you how endpoint telemetry feeds into threat detection.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: This is the XDR Workbench. All alerts from endpoint, email, and network sensors flow into here. This alert — Suspicious PowerShell Execution — was correlated from three separate endpoint events into one investigation.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: How long did it take to correlate that? Our current SIEM takes about 20 minutes to correlate events.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: This was under two minutes end-to-end. The correlation engine runs in real time. You can also see the attack chain visualization — it shows lateral movement attempts, which processes were spawned.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: That attack chain view is really useful. Can we integrate our existing Splunk deployment with this?

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Yes, we have a native Splunk app, and you can push alerts from Workbench to Splunk via API. Now let me show you Risk Insights — this ties back to your BYOD concern.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: This is Risk Insights. This BYOD Device Exposure tile shows you your attack surface from unmanaged devices. Right now in this demo tenant, it's showing 47 devices with elevated risk.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Can we set risk thresholds? Like, if a device risk score exceeds a certain level, automatically revoke access to corporate data?

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Exactly — that's what this Remediation Workflow button kicks off. You define the thresholds, and Vision One automatically quarantines the container, sends a notification to the employee and IT, and logs the event. No manual steps.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: That automated response is what we need. We're currently doing this manually and it takes hours.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Vision One is built to automate exactly those workflows. Let me take you back to the endpoint policy overview to show you the reporting capabilities.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Overall this is impressive. The BYOD container approach and the automated risk response are the two things I want to explore further. What would a POC look like?

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: We can set up a POC in your environment in about a week. I'll connect you with our sales team — they can scope it for your 3,500 endpoints. You'll also get access to this exact tenant to continue exploring after the show.

entries.speaker: Visitor
entries.text: Perfect. And just to confirm — you support both cloud and on-prem data residency? We have regulatory requirements around data staying in the EU.

entries.speaker: SE
entries.text: Yes, we have EU-region tenants and data residency guarantees. Our compliance team can provide a Data Processing Agreement. I'll include that in the follow-up materials.
